# KonsaCard

> Independent comparison tool that ranks Pakistani credit cards, debit cards, and wallets by the restaurant discounts they actually give you — based on the restaurants you eat at, the cities you live in, and the cards you already own. Not sponsored by any bank.

KonsaCard (konsacard.pk) covers 19 Pakistani banks and 1,200+ restaurants across Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad. Users pick their city, the restaurants they care about, and the cards they hold, and the site computes a "Fit Score" that combines each card's discount rate, monthly cap, minimum spend, weekday/weekend rules, and tier requirements. The dataset is refreshed from bank offer pages, the Peekaboo discount feed, the Easypaisa DiscountWorld feed, and the NBP merchant workbook; the methodology page documents the sources and the scoring formula.

The product is free, ad-supported, and has no affiliate links to banks. Pricing, eligibility, and offer terms come from public sources; users are advised to confirm with the bank before applying.

## How KonsaCard works

- [Methodology](https://konsacard.pk/methodology/): How offer data is sourced, normalized, and scored, and how the Fit Score is computed from user inputs.
- [How discount caps work](https://konsacard.pk/how-discount-caps-work/): Explainer on monthly/per-transaction caps and why a higher headline discount % can still pay out less.
- [How card tiers affect discounts](https://konsacard.pk/how-card-tiers-affect-discounts/): Why the same bank's Platinum, Gold, and Classic cards can give very different discounts at the same restaurant.

## Banks covered

- [Al Baraka Bank](https://konsacard.pk/banks/al-baraka-bank/)
- [Allied Bank](https://konsacard.pk/banks/allied-bank/)
- [Askari Bank Limited](https://konsacard.pk/banks/askari-bank-limited/)
- [Bank AL Habib](https://konsacard.pk/banks/bank-al-habib/)
- [Bank Alfalah](https://konsacard.pk/banks/bank-alfalah/)
- [Bank of Punjab](https://konsacard.pk/banks/bank-of-punjab/)
- [BankIslami](https://konsacard.pk/banks/bankislami/)
- [Easypaisa](https://konsacard.pk/banks/easypaisa/)
- [Faysal Bank Limited](https://konsacard.pk/banks/faysal-bank-limited/)
- [Habib Bank Limited (HBL)](https://konsacard.pk/banks/habib-bank-limited/)
- [Habib Metro Bank](https://konsacard.pk/banks/habib-metro-bank/)
- [HBL Islamic Bank Limited](https://konsacard.pk/banks/hbl-islamic-bank-limited/)
- [JS Bank](https://konsacard.pk/banks/js-bank/)
- [MCB Bank Limited](https://konsacard.pk/banks/mcb-bank-limited/)
- [MCB Islamic Bank Ltd](https://konsacard.pk/banks/mcb-islamic-bank-ltd/)
- [Meezan Bank](https://konsacard.pk/banks/meezan-bank/)
- [National Bank of Pakistan](https://konsacard.pk/banks/national-bank-of-pakistan/)
- [United Bank Limited (UBL)](https://konsacard.pk/banks/united-bank-limited-ubl/)

## Cities served

KonsaCard covers restaurant discounts in Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad. City selection is a filter on the main comparison tool at [konsacard.pk](https://konsacard.pk/) rather than a separate URL.

## Restaurants

Individual restaurant pages live under `https://konsacard.pk/restaurants/<slug>/`. The full enumeration is in the sitemap rather than this file:

- [Sitemap](https://konsacard.pk/sitemap.xml): All bank, restaurant, and content pages.

## About

- [About KonsaCard](https://konsacard.pk/about/): Who runs the site and why it exists.
- [Contact](https://konsacard.pk/contact/): How to report a wrong offer or suggest a missing restaurant or card.
- [Privacy Policy](https://konsacard.pk/privacy-policy/)
- [Terms](https://konsacard.pk/terms/)
